content:
✨ LinuxPlay | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Providing an ultra-low latency remote desktop experience for Linux, particularly for gaming and power users who require fine-grained control over the streaming process.
✨ Key Features: • Ultra-low latency remote desktop and game streaming • Support for H.264 and H.265 (HEVC) codecs • Hardware acceleration (NVENC, QSV, VAAPI, AMF)
📖 Summary: LinuxPlay is an experimental, open-source remote desktop and game streaming solution for Linux hosts and Windows clients. It prioritizes ultra-low latency and granular control over codecs, transport, and capture methods, leveraging FFmpeg and UDP for efficient streaming.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
